response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development, distributed systems, and mentorship, but his background leans heavily toward web/mobile development and high-level architecture rather than low-level systems programming in C++. While his experience with distributed systems and infrastructure is relevant, he lacks direct experience with large-scale cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture. His leadership and mentorship experience is strong, but his lack of deep C++ infrastructure experience may require additional evaluation.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and high-performance computing (e.g., real-time metadata handling, AI-agent infrastructure).
Proven leadership and mentorship experience (e.g., organizing workshops, founding GISCollective, leading teams).
Diverse technical expertise across multiple languages and platforms (C++, D, JavaScript, TypeScript, cloud technologies).
concerns: Limited direct experience with large-scale cloud compute platforms or hardware architecture (core requirement).
C++ experience is present but not explicitly in infrastructure or cloud compute contexts (focus on embedded/desktop).
No clear production-level cloud architecture experience balancing short- and long-term needs (preferred qualification).
